reviews.author: Guest Traveler 1
reviews.title: Perfect Getaway
reviews.body: Dining options were amazing. Specialty restaurants were worth the cover charge. The theater shows were Broadway quality. Slipped off to 21-Night Western Caribbean Fun & Sun and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 2
reviews.title: Fantastic value
reviews.body: The ship was clean and well maintained. Wi-Fi was a bit slow in remote areas, but overall a great value cruise. Slipped off to 21-Night Western Caribbean Fun & Sun and had a fantastic time.

reviews.title: Unbelievable Cruise!
reviews.body: Absolutely loved the balcony cabin and the service was top notch! The excursions in ports of call were well organized. Slipped off to 21-Night Western Caribbean Fun & Sun and had a fantastic time.

seo.title: 21-Night Western Caribbean Fun & Sun | Sun Princess | Princess Cruises
